_description: Lemma to sub-theme assignment for the four hierarchical theme categories (food_drink, animals, science_technology, arts_entertainment). Used by Code's bulk-theming pipeline (see BRIEF_for_code_bulk_translations.md). When Code's WordNet pass tags a lemma with the parent theme, also add the sub-theme(s) from this file.
_source: Hand-authored by vocab chat 2026-05-27, derived from extend_lemma_themes_v2.py
_convention: Each lemma maps to a list of sub-themes. Entries should be tagged with BOTH the parent theme AND the sub-theme(s), e.g. mela gets ['food_drink', 'food_fruit'].
